summary: The diff implements both REQ-19 and REQ-20 largely as specified. DoctorCard.tsx provides all required card fields (avatar/placeholder, name, qualification, specialty, experience, star rating with icons + numeric, fee, consultation mode badges, Book Now button). DoctorListingPage.tsx adds the four sort controls (Highest Rated, Lowest Fee, Most Experienced, Available Today) with active highlighting and real-time reordering. Mock data is sourced from mockDoctors.ts. The 'Available Today' filter correctly uses isTodayAvailable. Sorting state is held in component-level useState which persists as long as the component is mounted across specialty filter navigation. A few unrequested features were added.

hallucinated_features.description: Search/filter input field above the doctor card list
hallucinated_features.reason: DoctorListingPage.tsx includes a search query state and search input UI that filters doctors by name, specialty, or qualification. This feature was not requested in REQ-19 or REQ-20.

hallucinated_features.description: Available Today green dot indicator on DoctorCard avatar
hallucinated_features.reason: DoctorCard.tsx renders a green dot badge on the avatar when the doctor is available today. This visual indicator on the card was not part of the card field requirements in REQ-19.

hallucinated_features.description: Hover accent bar animation on DoctorCard
hallucinated_features.reason: A top accent bar that animates its width on hover was added to DoctorCard. This animated decoration was not specified in any requirement.
